The default messageBox type.
DEFAULT - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.PreScrollingType
The default scrolling type.
DEFAULT - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.SyntaxType
The default syntax type; In this case the article syntax will be identical to the syntax defined for the whole wiki.
DEFAULT - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.VerticalAlignment
The default alignment.

DICTIONARY - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"dictionary": The name for accessing the A page.
DISAMB_CAT - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"disambCat": The name for the disambiguation category text.
DISAMB_PRES - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"disambPres": The name for a disambiguation article presentation.
DISAMB_TEXT - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"disambText": The name for the disambiguation text.
DocGeneratorAPI - Class in org.docgene.api
The generator API, usable in another application.

Create the API and don't reset the configuration.
